tokenizers.label: gpt2_bpe

frozen_g180.rule: refit Ridge on original g180 train rows only, then freeze for all g180b rows

no_interface_feature_exploratory.note: Exploratory only; embedding/lm_head Qwen-reference features removed and Ridge refit on g180 train rows.

shuffled_geometry_permutation_test.note: Permute geometry features (not early_loss) across rows; repredict with frozen Ridge. p < 0.05 means real geometry ordering is informative.
